name: qiming-tianqing-waf
description: OctoBus package for Qiming Tianqing WAF IP block and unblock orchestration.

Qiming_Tianqing_WAF.QimingTianqingWafSer.name: block-ip
Qiming_Tianqing_WAF.QimingTianqingWafSer.description: Log in to Qiming Tianqing WAF and add IPs to the blacklist.

Qiming_Tianqing_WAF.QimingTianqingWafSer.name: unblock-ip
Qiming_Tianqing_WAF.QimingTianqingWafSer.description: Log in to Qiming Tianqing WAF and remove IPs from the blacklist.
